exemplar.title: M25 #1: Do historians and human scientists have an ethical obligation to follow the directive: "do not ignore contradictory evidence"? Discuss with reference to history and the human sciences.

detailedExemplarData.title: M25 #1: Do historians and human scientists have an ethical obligation to follow the directive: "do not ignore contradictory evidence"? Discuss with reference to history and the human sciences.

strengths: Sustained, clear focus on the prescribed title with repeated return to the ethical demand
Effective and relevant links to History and the Human Sciences through concrete, specific examples
Clear, coherent arguments supported by wellâchosen case studies (Civil War historiography, British imperial narratives, humanâsciences research)
Demonstrates awareness of and some evaluation of alternative viewpoints (e.g., national cohesion vs. factual accuracy, methodological simplicity vs. complexity)
Engaging use of metaphor and a cohesive concluding synthesis that reaffirms the overarching ethical imperative
weaknesses: Analysis occasionally remains at a surface level; key TOK concepts (e.g., âethical obligation,â âobjectivityâ) are asserted rather than fully unpacked
Evaluation of counterâpositions is present but not consistently balanced or deeply weighed
Minor lapses in clarity and proofreading errors interrupt overall coherence
Limited engagement with peerâreviewed or primary academic sources to strengthen the authority of examples
Conclusion reiterates earlier points without extending to a broader TOK question or reflecting on wider implications
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the essay exhibits the hallmarks of the 7â8 bandâsustained focus, effective AOK links, coherent argumentation, specific examples, and awareness of alternative perspectivesâit falls short of consistently sophisticated analysis and contains occasional clarity lapses. Its many strengths, however, justify placing it at the top of the band. By refining the depth of conceptual unpacking, strengthening evaluation of counterâarguments, and improving academic source engagement, the essay could reach the highest band. On balance, the quality of focus, coherence, and concrete exemplification merits a final score of 8.

annotations.comment: This introduction to the human sciences section could be sharpened by specifying which methodological standards (e.g., experimental control, replicability) underpin its self-correcting nature.
The summary closing this page contains typographical errors (âarstnding,â âAkidâ). Proofread to correct these and ensure clarity in concluding remarks.
The final paragraph synthesizes insights from both AOKs and reaffirms the overarching ethical imperative, effectively drawing the essay to a cohesive close.
The reference list includes few peer-reviewed studies; incorporating more academic journal articles or primary sources would better support the depth of TOK analysis.
This sentence ends abruptly with âThis,â indicating an incomplete thought. Review sentence structure to ensure each idea is fully developed and clearly communicated.
The metaphor comparing contradictory evidence to a detectiveâs hidden clue is engaging and effectively draws the reader into the importance of challenging established narratives.
This opening thesis clearly states the essayâs aim and introduces the dual focus on ethical and epistemic dimensions, providing a coherent roadmap for the reader.
The contrast drawn between history and the human sciences is clear and helps frame the next discussion on methodological norms and evidence evaluation.
The essay correctly identifies and restates the prescribed title, ensuring sustained focus on the question throughout.

The introduction employs a vivid detective metaphor but does not define the TOK concepts of âethical obligationâ or âcontradictory evidence,â leaving the key terms ambiguous. Consider explicitly defining these terms to ground the discussion in TOK terminology.

This paragraph outlines the general role of contradictory evidence but remains largely descriptive. To deepen analysis, link these observations to specific knowledge questions or TOK frameworks (e.g., objectivity vs interpretation).
Integration of the JSTOR source feels abrupt; consider weaving citations more seamlessly into the argument to strengthen coherence and authority.
While specific, the causal logic behind why early narratives sidelined slavery could be unpacked more deeplyâconsider exploring socio-political motives in greater detail.
The Civil War historiography example is well chosen and illustrates how new primary sources reshaped prevailing narratives, effectively linking to the ethical demand under discussion.
This analysis would benefit from engaging with historiographical debates or secondary scholarship to explain why imperial narratives persisted despite contradictory records.
The thesis could be strengthened with explicit signposting of the essayâs structure (e.g., which examples will be examined in each AOK) to guide the argument more clearly.
The discussion acknowledges historian bias and the tension between ethical responsibility and interpretive frameworks, demonstrating awareness of multiple viewpoints within the AOK.
Evaluating the trade-off between national unity and factual accuracy adds depth, showing how ethical obligations can conflict with political imperatives.
The British Empire example compellingly illustrates strategic omission of contradictory evidence and highlights ethical dilemmas between narrative cohesion and accuracy.
Acknowledging methodological and practical challenges in integrating epigenetic evidence demonstrates nuanced understanding of how clarity and complexity can compete in knowledge production.
The account of epigenetics remains descriptive; deepen the analysis by linking this sidelining to the ethical imperative and exploring its long-term effects on theory development.
While comprehensive, the conclusion reiterates earlier points without proposing a broader knowledge question or reflecting on implications for TOK inquiry. Consider extending reflection.
The bibliography relies heavily on popular online sources and lacks engagement with peer-reviewed or primary academic literature, which would strengthen the essayâs credibility.

The essay does not
reach a standard
described by levels
1â5 or is not a
response to one of
the prescribed titles
on the list for the
current session.
The discussion is weakly connected to the title. While there may be links to the areas of knowledge, any relevant points are descriptive or consist only of unsupported assertions.

The discussion is connected to the title and makes superficial or limited links to areas of knowledge. The discussion is largely descriptive. Limited arguments are offered but they are unclear and are not supported by effective examples.

The discussion
is focused on
the title and is
developed with
some links to
areas of
knowledge.
Arguments are
offered and are
supported by
examples.
There is some
awareness of
different points
of view.

The discussion is focused on the title and is linked effectively to areas of knowledge. Arguments are clear, coherent and supported by examples. There is awareness and some evaluation of different points of view.

The discussion has a sustained focus on the title and is linked effectively to areas of knowledge. Arguments are clear, coherent and effectively supported by specific examples. The implications of arguments are considered. There is clear awareness and evaluation of different points of view.
